Crea sumPlus1(arr) y retorna suma total + 1.
solution: function sumPlus1(arr) { return arr.reduce((acc, x) => acc + x, 0) + 1; }

Crea solve1(arr) -> filtra pares, duplica y suma todo + 1.
solution: function solve1(arr) { return arr.filter((x) => x % 2 === 0).map((x) => x * 2).reduce((acc, x) => acc + x, 0) + 1; }
